phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH eel DEE-eh-chee KOR-soh KOH-moh?
phrases.cultural_note: 10 Corso Como is Milan's iconic concept store — part gallery, bookshop, bar and fashion boutique — a must for design lovers.

responses.english: Right outside Garibaldi station, on the left.
responses.phonetic: SOO-bee-toh FWOH-ree DAL-lah stah-TSYOH-neh gah-ree-BAL-dee, ah see-NEES-trah.
responses.french: Subito fuori dalla stazione Garibaldi, a sinistra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Bosco Verticale towers are
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si trovano le Torri del Bosco Verticale?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh leh TOR-ree del BOS-koh ver-tee-KAH-leh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Bosco Verticale (Vertical Forest) towers are Milan's most photographed modern buildings, designed by Stefano Boeri.

responses.english: At Piazza Gae Aulenti, two minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: een PYAHT-tsah gah-EH ow-LEN-tee, ah DOO-eh mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee.
responses.french: In Piazza Gae Aulenti, a due minuti a piedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro line stops at Garibaldi
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale linea della metropolitana ferma a Garibaldi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh LEE-neh-ah DEL-lah meh-troh-poh-lee-TAH-nah FER-mah ah gah-ree-BAL-dee?

responses.english: Lines two and five, and the suburban rail.
responses.phonetic: leh LEE-neh-ah DOO-eh eh CHEEN-kweh, eh eel pas-SAN-teh feh-roh-vee-AH-ryoh.
responses.french: Le linee due e cinque, e il Passante Ferroviario.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat brunch in this area
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, c'è un buon posto per il brunch qui vicino?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, cheh oon bwohn POS-toh per eel brunch kwee vee-CHEE-noh?

responses.english: Yes, several spots on Corso Como and Piazza Gae Aulenti.
responses.phonetic: see, dee-VER-see loh-KAH-lee een KOR-soh KOH-moh eh PYAHT-tsah gah-EH ow-LEN-tee.
responses.french: Sì, diversi locali in Corso Como e Piazza Gae Aulenti.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the area is good for an evening out
phrases.text_local: Scusi, questa zona è animata la sera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWES-tah DZOH-nah eh ah-nee-MAH-tah lah SEH-rah?

responses.english: Yes, it's one of Milan's liveliest neighbourhoods at night.
responses.phonetic: see, eh OO-noh day kwahr-TYEH-ree PYOO vee-VAH-chee dee mee-LAH-noh dee NOT-teh.
responses.french: Sì, è uno dei quartieri più vivaci di Milano di notte.
